summary: Sample case on confession and conviction.

chunks.heading: Facts
chunks.text: The accused was charged with an offence and made a confessional statement.

chunks.heading: Issue
chunks.text: Whether a confession alone can sustain conviction.

chunks.heading: Holding
chunks.text: A voluntary confession may sustain conviction if the court accepts it as true.

chunks.heading: Ratio
chunks.text: A confession that is direct, positive and unequivocal may ground conviction.
